title: gymnogramma portoricensis
intro: Gymnogramma portoricensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Puerto Rican Gymnogramma or Puerto Rican Razor Grass. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin irritations, and infections, and is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Gymnogramma portoricensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is often used in natural remedies to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
